content: Better Auth v1.6.x Next.js App Router setup: 1) auth.ts in lib/ using betterAuth({ database: drizzleAdapter(db, { provider: 'pg', schema }), emailAndPassword: { enabled: true, requireEmailVerification: true, sendResetPassword: async({user,url}) => sendEmail(...) }, emailVerification: { sendVerificationEmail: async({user,url}) => sendEmail(...) } }). 2) Route handler at /app/api/auth/[...all]/route.ts using toNextJsHandler(auth) from 'better-auth/next-js'. 3) Client at lib/auth-client.ts using createAuthClient() from 'better-auth/react'. 4) Session in Server Components: auth.api.getSession({ headers: await headers() }). 5) getSessionCookie() for middleware (cookie existence check only, not validation). 6) Default session expiry: 7 days, refreshed every 1 day. Env vars: BETTER_AUTH_SECRET, BETTER_AUTH_URL. Run 'npx auth@latest generate' to scaffold schema.
